heading: Study of alternative means of construction
label: 720g Study of alternative means of construction

children.heading: Requirement of study
children.label: a Requirement of study
children.text: If no application for the issuance of a certificate or amended certificate of public convenience and necessity authorizing the construction and operation of an Alaska natural gas transportation project has been filed with the Commission by the date that is 18 months after , the Secretary shall conduct a study of alternative approaches to the construction and operation of such an Alaska natural gas transportation project.October 13, 2004
establishing a Federal Government corporation to construct an Alaska natural gas transportation project; and

securing alternative means of providing Federal financing and ownership (including alternative combinations of Government and private corporate ownership) of the Alaska natural gas transportation project.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: c Consultation
children.text: In conducting the study under subsection (a), the Secretary shall consult with the Secretary of the Treasury and the Secretary of the Army (acting through the Chief of Engineers).
the results of the study; and
any recommendations of the Secretary (including proposals for legislation to implement the recommendations).
